instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
response: Stepping into this coffee shop, you immediately feel the warmth of the space. The interior is incredibly comfortable, with soft lighting and plush seating that invites lingering. The menu variety is impressive, offering everything from artisanal lattes to exotic teas. Staff members are friendly and attentive, ensuring every order is perfect. They smile often and handle requests with genuine care. The aroma of freshly roasted beans fills the air, making the experience truly special. I found the pastries equally delicious, pairing beautifully with the rich brews. Prices are reasonable for such high-quality ingredients and service. It is clear the owners care deeply about their craft and their guests. This place has become my favorite spot for morning meetings or quiet reading. I highly recommend visiting soon to enjoy the atmosphere. It is truly a delightful addition to the neighborhood.

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints.new_constraint: Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
Conflicts between Keyword Constraints.org_constraint: The second sentence must include the keyword "cozy."
